title: India States and Capitals
description: A mixed India capitals round with states, union territories, reverse clues, and a few administrative twists.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Arunachal Pradesh?
questions.hint: It lies in the Himalayan foothills and begins with I.

questions.prompt: Dispur is the capital of which Indian state?
questions.hint: Its largest city is Guwahati.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Chhattisgarh?
questions.hint: It is also one of India's fastest-growing planned cities.

questions.prompt: Panaji is the capital of which state?
questions.hint: It was a Portuguese territory until 1961.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Himachal Pradesh?
questions.hint: It served as the summer capital of British India.

questions.prompt: Ranchi is the capital of which state?
questions.hint: It was carved out of Bihar in 2000.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Kerala?
questions.hint: Its old colonial name was Trivandrum.

questions.prompt: Bhopal is the capital of which Indian state?
questions.hint: Its largest city is Indore.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Manipur?
questions.hint: It lies in a valley in the northeast.

questions.prompt: Shillong is the capital of which Indian state?
questions.hint: It is often called the Scotland of the East.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Mizoram?
questions.hint: It begins with A and is a hill city.

questions.prompt: Kohima is the capital of which state?
questions.hint: Its neighboring major city is Dimapur.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Odisha?
questions.hint: It is named after a temple city and is known for planned sectors.

questions.prompt: Chandigarh serves as the capital of which state in addition to being a union territory and shared capital with Haryana?
questions.hint: Its major holy city is Amritsar.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Sikkim?
questions.hint: It lies on a ridge above the Teesta valley.

questions.prompt: Agartala is the capital of which state?
questions.hint: It borders Bangladesh on three sides.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Uttarakhand in winter?
questions.hint: Its summer capital is Gairsain.

questions.prompt: Lucknow is the capital of which Indian state?
questions.hint: The state includes Varanasi, Prayagraj, and Kanpur.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of West Bengal?
questions.hint: It was once the capital of British India.

questions.prompt: Gandhinagar is the capital of which state?
questions.hint: Its largest city is Ahmedabad.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Haryana?
questions.hint: It is shared with Punjab and is a union territory too.

questions.prompt: Bengaluru is the capital of which Indian state?
questions.hint: Its old name was Mysore State.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Bihar?
questions.hint: It is one of the oldest continuously inhabited places in India.

questions.prompt: Jaipur is the capital of which state?
questions.hint: It is known as the Pink City.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Maharashtra?
questions.hint: It is also India's financial capital.

questions.prompt: Amaravati is associated with the capital plans of which state?
questions.hint: Its high court is at Amaravati and its largest city is Visakhapatnam.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Nagaland?
questions.hint: The famous World War II battle there took place nearby.

questions.prompt: Hyderabad serves as the capital of which state as of 2026?
questions.hint: It was a shared capital for a time after bifurcation.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Tamil Nadu?
questions.hint: It was formerly called Madras.

questions.prompt: Srinagar is the summer capital of which union territory?
questions.hint: Its winter capital is Jammu.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Andhra Pradesh?
questions.hint: It is located on the banks of the Krishna River region.

questions.prompt: Leh is the headquarters of which union territory?
questions.hint: Kargil is the other district centre in the same UT.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Meghalaya?
questions.hint: It is a hill station with a famous peak nearby.

questions.prompt: Port Blair is the capital of which union territory?
questions.hint: It is known for the Cellular Jail.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Tripura?
questions.hint: Its name begins with A.

questions.prompt: Daman is part of the capital arrangement of which union territory?
questions.hint: The UT name contains Daman, Diu, Dadra, and Nagar Haveli.
questions.answer: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Mizoram?
questions.hint: It begins with A and ends with wl.

questions.prompt: Kavaratti is the capital of which union territory?
questions.hint: It is India's smallest UT by area.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Sikkim?
questions.hint: It is the state's largest urban centre.

questions.prompt: Puducherry is the capital of which union territory?
questions.hint: It was once known in English as Pondicherry.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Rajasthan?
questions.hint: It is part of the tourist Golden Triangle with Delhi and Agra.

questions.prompt: New Delhi is the capital of India and of which union territory?
questions.hint: Its full current name begins with National Capital Territory.
questions.answer: Delhi or National Capital Territory of Delhi

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Assam?
questions.hint: It lies within the Guwahati metropolitan region.

questions.prompt: Bhubaneswar is the capital of which state?
questions.hint: Its old imperial city nearby is Cuttack.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Arunachal Pradesh?
questions.hint: It begins with I and ends with nagar.

questions.prompt: Dehradun serves as the winter capital of which state?
questions.hint: The state also includes Nainital, Haridwar, and Kedarnath.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Punjab?
questions.hint: It is a planned city designed by Le Corbusier.

questions.prompt: Panaji is the capital of which state?
questions.hint: It is famous for beaches, churches, and Lusophone heritage.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of Jharkhand?
questions.hint: It begins with R and was once a center for heavy engineering nearby.

questions.prompt: Gangtok is the capital of which Himalayan state?
questions.hint: It borders Bhutan, Nepal, and Tibet.
